name: chainapi
description: Workflow-aware API testing tool with auto-resolved dependency chains
$qt-comment: Qt 6.8 LTS is installed out-of-band (Qt online installer locally, aqtinstall in CI). Building qtbase from source via vcpkg adds 45-90 minutes per cold-cache CI run, which exceeded AppVeyor's 60-min-per-job cap. Pre-built Qt drops the cold cache to ~10-15 min total. CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH is set per-environment (see CMakePresets.json + tools/setup-qt.* / CI YAML).
